case_title: ZAKI ALSHALYAN VS. JENNIFER L TAN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALSHALYAN, ZAKI AS TO DEFENDANT TAN, JENNIFER L LOUIE, AMY LOUIE, ROGER W H DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-17-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-15-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-02-2003
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-09-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 225 SET FOR FEB-10-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOV-26-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-09-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-26-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-17-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 225 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-10-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ALBERT S. WOOD, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-09-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-24-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY SARA LERSCHEN, CSR #6213. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
